title: Iron Torso
description: Upper body strength with archer push-ups, face pulls and reverse snow angels

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Scapular push-ups
exercises.instructions: In a plank, retract and protract the shoulder blades without bending the elbows

exercises.name: Cat-cow
exercises.instructions: On all fours, alternate cat and cow, breathe

exercises.name: Archer push-ups
exercises.instructions: One arm extended to the side, lower toward the other hand

exercises.name: Incline push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands on a raised surface, easier

exercises.name: Explosive push-ups
exercises.instructions: Push hard to lift the hands off the floor

exercises.name: Floor face pulls
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, elbows at 90 degrees, pull backward

exercises.name: Reverse snow angels
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, arms by the body, arc on the floor

exercises.name: Alternating Superman
exercises.instructions: Lift right arm + left leg, alternate

exercises.name: Chest stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm against a wall at 90 degrees, pivot the body

exercises.name: Triceps stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm behind the head, pull the elbow with the other hand

exercises.name: Scorpion stretch
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, bring the foot to the opposite hand, twisting

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
